name: Decorative Plastic Lid Black - Brightroom™: Storage Bin Lid, Universal Placement, Cut-Out Handles, 14.72"x12.52"
description:
Help hide the clutter with the addition of this Decorative Plastic Lid from Brightroom™. The black decorative lid is made of BPA-free plastic material, and is perfectly sized to fit storage bins for storage on a shelf or in a closet. Plus, side cutout handles make for easy carrying from room to room.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
